note: Invitation to a family social event (a baby's first birthday party) — family_event_invite.

input.rawContent:
From: cousin.mei@gmail.com
Subject: Leo's 1st birthday — July 12!

You're invited! We're celebrating Leo turning ONE on Saturday July 12 at 2 PM at our place. Cake, bubbles, and a splash pad for the babies. Let us know if you can make it!
